templates.name: Project Budget Alert (80%)
templates.description: Notifies the project owner when an agency project budget reaches 80% consumption so the team can review scope and burn before exceeding the budget.

actionConfig.title: Budget alert: {{project.name}} at 80%
actionConfig.message: The project {{project.name}} for {{customer.name}} has consumed 80% of its budget. Review hours logged and consider whether scope or budget needs adjustment.

templates.name: Project Budget Exceeded (100%)
templates.description: Notifies project owner and org admins when an agency project budget is exceeded so the team can pause work or request a change order.

actionConfig.title: Budget exceeded: {{project.name}}
actionConfig.message: The project {{project.name}} for {{customer.name}} has exceeded its budget. Pause non-essential work, raise a change order, or escalate to {{org.name}} leadership.

actionConfig.title: Budget exceeded: {{project.name}}
actionConfig.message: Project {{project.name}} ({{customer.name}}) has consumed 100% of its budget. Review with the project owner and decide whether to pause work or raise a change order.

templates.name: Retainer Period Closing (3 days)
templates.description: Notifies the project owner three days before the retainer period end date so unused hours can be flagged, top-ups requested, or rollover decisions made.

actionConfig.title: Retainer closing in 3 days: {{project.name}}
actionConfig.message: The retainer period for {{project.name}} ({{customer.name}}) closes in 3 days. Reconcile hours, raise a top-up if needed, or apply the rollover policy.

templates.name: Task Blocked (7 days idle)
templates.description: Notifies the project owner when a task has been idle for 7 days so blockers can be resolved quickly.
templates._comment: Trigger gap (ADR-244): the spec calls for a TASK_STATUS_UNCHANGED trigger that does not yet exist in the TriggerType registry. This rule uses FIELD_DATE_APPROACHING on task.lastStatusChangeAt as the nearest-fit scheduled trigger and will be inert until a future phase introduces TASK_STATUS_UNCHANGED. The JSON loader ignores unknown fields so this comment ships with the pack but is not persisted on the AutomationRule.

actionConfig.title: Task idle for 7 days: {{task.title}} ({{project.name}})
actionConfig.message: The task {{task.title}} on {{project.name}} for {{customer.name}} has not changed status in 7 days. Check whether it is blocked, reassign it, or close it out.

templates.name: Unbilled Time Older Than 30 Days
templates.description: Notifies org admins when billable time remains unbilled for over 30 days so invoicing can be actioned promptly.
templates._comment: Trigger gap (ADR-244): the spec calls for a dedicated TIME_ENTRY_AGE trigger that does not yet exist in the TriggerType registry. This rule uses FIELD_DATE_APPROACHING on timeEntry.workDate as the nearest-fit scheduled trigger and will be inert until a future phase introduces TIME_ENTRY_AGE. The JSON loader ignores unknown fields so this comment ships with the pack but is not persisted on the AutomationRule.

actionConfig.title: Unbilled time over 30 days: {{customer.name}}
actionConfig.message: Billable time on {{project.name}} for {{customer.name}} has been unbilled for more than 30 days. Review and roll the entries into a draft invoice from {{org.name}}.

templates.name: Proposal Follow-Up (5 days)
templates.description: Sends a follow-up email and reminder five days after a proposal is sent so the agency can chase a decision before the lead goes cold.

actionConfig.title: Follow up on proposal: {{customer.name}}
actionConfig.message: It has been 5 days since the proposal for {{customer.name}} (R{{proposal.total}}) was sent. Check in with the client and update the opportunity status.

actionConfig.subject: Following up on our proposal
actionConfig.body:
Dear {{customer.name}},

We wanted to check in on the proposal we sent through five days ago for the value of R{{proposal.total}}. Please let us know if you have any questions or if there is anything we can clarify to help you make a decision.

Kind regards,
{{org.name}}
